findings.issue: Installer preflight behavior should be described next to overwrite behavior.
findings.evidence: The release Review Packet lists installer preflight as a packaging-readiness requirement.
findings.impact: External users may not understand why a non-force install fails before writing.
findings.suggested_fix: Document conflict preflight in packaging docs.

findings.issue: Model override examples should name both reviewer and Prime Owl flags.
findings.evidence: The Review Packet says model defaults are configurable through installer flags.
findings.impact: Users may miss the Prime-specific override.

findings.issue: Release checklist text needs to match the selected MIT license.
findings.evidence: The release checklist is part of external packaging docs.
findings.suggested_fix: Confirm the checklist no longer says the license is unchosen.
